languages.text: [Убить] "Я не вижу иных вариантов. Мне жаль, Эоганн".
[Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."

languages.text: [Ihn töten] "Ich kann nichts mehr tun. Es tut mir leid, Eogunn.
languages.original_text: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."

languages.text: [Le tuer] « Je ne peux rien faire d'autre. Pardonnez-moi, Eogunn. »
languages.original_text: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."

traits.locale_text: [Le tuer] « Je ne peux rien faire d'autre. Pardonnez-moi, Eogunn. »

languages.text: [Matarlo] «No tengo otra opción. Lo lamento, Eogunn».
languages.original_text: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."

traits.locale_text: [Matarlo] «No tengo otra opción. Lo lamento, Eogunn».

languages.text: [Onu öldür] "Yapabileceğim başka hiçbir şey yok. Üzgünüm Eogunn."
languages.original_text: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."

traits.locale_text: [Onu öldür] "Yapabileceğim başka hiçbir şey yok. Üzgünüm Eogunn."

languages.text: 【杀了他】“我别无他法了。抱歉，伊奥贡。”
languages.original_text: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."

traits.locale_text: 【杀了他】“我别无他法了。抱歉，伊奥贡。”

languages.text: ［彼を殺す］「ほかに、できることはない。すまない、エオガン」
languages.original_text: [Kill him] "There is nothing else I can do. I am sorry, Eogunn."
